extractor.name: smoke-rechnungsnummer
extractor.description: Smoke-test extractor that pulls the German invoice number off a single-page PDF.

fields.name: Rechnungs Nummer
fields.description: Die eindeutige Rechnungsnummer (the invoice number printed on the document, often labeled 'Rechnung-Nr.', 'Rechnungsnummer', or 'Rechnung').
